content:
Unsure if this is a feature request or a QOL request, but i cannot find an option to have no awakener on the homescreen, only a background - does this option exist ? If it does, where is it ? Searched all menus and didn't find it. 
And if it doesn't, i would enjoy it
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Keeping only the background on homescreen / no awakener

content:
Dear Morimens Development Team,

First of all, thank you sincerely for creating such a wonderful and inspiring game. I’m writing this message as a Korean player to share some feedback and suggestions that I hope may help improve the overall experience for many new players.

Since yesterday, due to the influence of CZN, a large number of Korean users have joined the game and started their journey as new Keepers. However, since the game currently does not support a full Korean translation, immersion is significantly reduced. Despite this, many of us are still enjoying Morimens through auto-translated text as best we can.

That said, there are a few important issues we’ve noticed with the current Korean font in-game. The font size appears to be too large, causing lines of text to overlap or extend into a third line, which often makes dialogue unreadable (please see the attached images).
While we understand that localization takes time, would it be possible to temporarily adjust the Korean font size in an upcoming patch? Ideally, the text could fit within two lines. This is not only a matter of immersion — during battles, it’s currently impossible to review dialogue or context when text is cut off, which makes it difficult to follow the story properly.

 Hello, I'm new player and I've been met with an issues of the game, preventing me from logging in at all. At the point of "checking for resources" screen goes black and crashes out, please help me.
When I installed and played right away everything was well, but after closing the app and trying to play again I was unable to. I tried the function "fix", afterwards it was well untill I again closed the app, and after happened the same. I doubt my phone is the issue since it can support much heavier games like PGR, Genshin impact and so on. Please help me out.
